text: The app crashes every time I try to upload a photo larger than 5MB.
label: bug_report

text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month, please refund one payment.
label: billing_issue

text: Would love a dark mode option, my eyes hurt at night.
label: feature_request

text: Absolutely love the new update, everything feels so smooth now!
label: praise

text: The dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load every morning.
label: performance_issue

text: I can never find the export button, the menu structure makes no sense.
label: ux_complaint

text: Login fails with error 500 whenever I use my Google account.
label: bug_report

text: Why is there no way to filter transactions by date range? Please add this.
label: feature_request

text: My invoice shows the wrong GST number, I need this corrected for my accounts.
label: billing_issue

text: Search results take forever to appear when the catalog is large.
label: performance_issue

text: The onboarding flow is confusing, I had no idea what to do after signing up.
label: ux_complaint

text: Customer support resolved my issue in under an hour, fantastic service!
label: praise

text: Data disappears from the cart when I switch between tabs.
label: bug_report

text: Please add support for exporting reports as Excel files.
label: feature_request

text: I cancelled my plan last month but was still billed yesterday.
label: billing_issue

text: Video playback stutters constantly even on fast wifi.
label: performance_issue

text: Too many popups asking me to rate the app, it interrupts my work.
label: ux_complaint

text: Been using this for two years and it keeps getting better. Great job team.
label: praise

text: Notifications arrive for messages I already deleted, clearly something broken.
label: bug_report

text: An offline mode would be a game changer for my field team.
label: feature_request

text: The upgrade page charged me in USD but advertised INR pricing.
label: billing_issue

text: App uses so much battery that my phone dies by lunchtime.
label: performance_issue

text: Font size is tiny and there is no way to increase it, very hard to read.
label: ux_complaint

text: The new sync feature saved me hours this week, thank you!
label: praise

text: Great, another update and now the share button does nothing. Amazing work as always.
label: bug_report
note: sarcasm reads like praise

text: Love the app overall but honestly the checkout crashing on UPI payments is killing me.
label: bug_report
note: mixed praise + bug, primary intent is the bug

text: App toh accha hai but payment ka option bahut kam hai, net banking bhi add karo please.
label: feature_request
note: Hinglish, praise + request

text: Wow, so intuitive that it only took me forty minutes to find the logout button.
label: ux_complaint
note: sarcasm

text: The app is slow to figure out. Took me a week to understand where anything is.
label: ux_complaint
note: 'slow' here means learnability, not speed

text: Everything lags after the last update, scrolling feels like wading through mud.
label: performance_issue
note: 'after the update' tempts bug_report; symptom is degraded speed

text: Mujhe do baar paisa kata hai iss month, refund kab milega?
label: billing_issue
note: Hinglish

text: It would be nice if the app didn't log me out every single day.
label: bug_report
note: phrased as a wish, describes broken behavior

text: Honestly can't complain, refund came through fast and the team was polite about my billing mixup.
label: praise
note: mentions billing but intent is praise

text: Why do I need seven taps to send one invoice? Add a quick-send shortcut.
label: feature_request
note: UX pain framed as a concrete request

text: The report page loads fine but the numbers in the revenue column are simply wrong.
label: bug_report
note: correctness issue, not performance

text: Subscription price is fine, I just wish there was a family plan option.
label: feature_request
note: mentions pricing but asks for a new plan type

text: Loading spinner just spins forever on the analytics tab, never actually loads.
label: bug_report
note: infinite load is broken behavior, not slowness

text: Yaar itna slow chal raha hai aajkal, kuch karo iska.
label: performance_issue
note: Hinglish

text: The free trial ended without warning and my card was charged, at least send an email before billing people.
label: billing_issue
note: billing pain with an embedded suggestion

text: Ten out of ten, would wait three minutes for the homepage to load again.
label: performance_issue
note: sarcastic praise about slowness

text: New design looks gorgeous, genuinely a joy to use now.
label: praise
note: mentions design; positive, not a UX complaint

text: I keep tapping the back button and losing all my form data, please save drafts automatically.
label: feature_request
note: data loss on back is expected behavior; the ask is autosave

text: Payment succeeded per my bank but the app still shows my plan as unpaid.
label: bug_report
note: involves payment but is a state-sync defect

text: The settings page is a maze. I gave up looking for the notification controls.
label: ux_complaint
note: navigation frustration

text: App crashed and when I reopened it, it charged my saved card again. Two problems in one.
label: billing_issue
note: crash + double charge; money impact dominates

text: Sab kuch theek hai lekin dashboard pe graphs samajh nahi aate, bahut cluttered hai.
label: ux_complaint
note: Hinglish, clutter complaint

text: Fast, clean, and it just works. Rare these days.
label: praise
note: mentions speed positively; not a performance issue

text: Could you make the app open faster? Cold start takes ages on my phone.
label: performance_issue
note: phrased as request; core issue is startup latency
